title: Backup's Dragon Elytra
description: Makes Your Elytra Look Like A Dragon Wing
body:
# About
This resource pack makes your Elytra look like a Dragon's wing!

## Requirements
- This resourcepack **requires** [[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) or [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) to work
- For color variants, [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) is needed!

## Help
You can support me by donating to my Ko-fi!

[![Ko-Fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a256a4dae1bca31bcf4b240ac2dcd3abcd255b80.png)](https://ko-fi.com/F1F11O4DZR)
